localizedMetadata.summary: Check & fix design accessibility issues

localizedMetadata.description:
Scan your Adobe Express designs for accessibility issues and fix them with one click. Accessibility Assistant checks for WCAG 2.1 compliance including color contrast, text size, and touch targets.

Features:
- Instant accessibility score (0-100) with WCAG AA/AAA badge
- One-click auto-fix for contrast and text size issues
- Multiple color suggestions per issue
- Color blindness preview (protanopia, deuteranopia, tritanopia)
- Undo any fix instantly
- Export reports as text or JSON
- Customizable thresholds in settings

How it works:
1. Click "Scan Design" to analyze your document
2. Review issues grouped by element with WCAG references
3. Click fix buttons or color swatches to resolve
4. Watch your score improve in real-time

Who it's for:
Designers, marketers, educators, and anyone creating visual content who wants to ensure their work is readable by people with visual impairments, color blindness, or other disabilities.

All processing happens locally

localizedMetadata.summary: Create image and text variations in bulk.
localizedMetadata.name: Bulk Create and Generate
localizedMetadata.description:
With Bulk Create and Generate, you can take a starting template or design in Adobe Express, and create variations of it in minutes by replacing your text and images. 

First, you must create your starting design. This should be a single page which you can create from scratch or use a template. All of your design variations will be based on this page, so now you can launch the add-on to continue. 

Second, Bulk Create and Generate will walk you through setting up a .csv template that will contain all of your design variation details. You'll indicate which images and text boxes you want to replace. 

Third, you'll provide the new content you want to use to replace your starting content in your downloaded .csv file. You can choose to replace content using locally stored images (referenced by their filename), text-to-image prompts, and text strings. 

Lastly, upload your finished .csv. Sit back and watch as the add-on turns your .csv file into dozens of new pages in minutes!

localizedMetadata.summary: Set separate fonts per character category at once
localizedMetadata.name: Composite Font
localizedMetadata.description:
Specify separate fonts/sizes for each character category at once, such as Kanji, Kana, and numbers, and so on, like the composite font feature in Illustrator and InDesign. The settings are saved in the document.

# Create composite font

1. Specify font/size for each character category directly to the text on the artboard
2. Press Add button with it selected

You can get the setting text by executing “Place template text” from the icon menu in the add-on panel.

# Apply

1. Select a text frame on the artboard
2. Select target composite font on the panel

And it will be applied with one click.

# Export

1. Select target composite fonts on the panel
2. Select “Download composite fonts” from the menu in the add-on panel

# Import

1. Select “Import from composite font file” from the menu in the add-on panel 
2. Select JSON file in the dialog
3. Confirm that you indeed want to execute or not in the dialog

Then, items with matching composite font id are overwritten, and others are added.

localizedMetadata.summary: Recreate any design: Vectorize & Font Match ✨
localizedMetadata.name: Design Digitizer
localizedMetadata.description:
See it. Snap it. Make it yours.

Design Digitizer brings designs from the real world onto your Adobe Express canvas.

Unlike simple tracers, Design Digitizer creates a flexible, fully customizable foundation by combining two powerful technologies:

Smart Vectorization
Turn photos, logos, or screenshots into crisp, scalable vector shapes. Backgrounds and elements are separated automatically, so you can recolor, resize, and refine your design instantly.

Font Recognition
Stop guessing typefaces. Design Digitizer analyzes text in your image and replaces it with the closest matching Adobe Font while preserving layout and spacing.

Start with one click or fine-tune the result by choosing different digitization approaches and iterating until it feels right.

Perfect for digitizing legacy assets, recreating inspiring layouts, and speeding up your design workflow.

Get your design out of the image and onto the canvas with Design Digitizer.

localizedMetadata.summary: Create double exposure art in Adobe Express.
localizedMetadata.name: Double Exposure
localizedMetadata.description:
Double Exposure lets you blend a subject photo with a texture or background image to create professional double-exposure artwork directly in Adobe Express.

How it works: Upload your main image (portrait or subject) and a second image (nature, city, patterns, or any texture). The add-on composites them so the subject’s silhouette reveals the texture inside it, giving you a single artistic image.

Features:
• Two-image workflow: main subject + texture/background
• Silhouette-based blending for clean double-exposure results
• Brush tools: erase, reveal, lighten, and darken for fine control over where the texture shows
• Transform controls: move, scale, and rotate the texture
• Vignette and edge refinement for a polished look
• Toning layer and canvas background options
• All editing happens inside the add-on panel in Adobe Express

Use it for posters, social covers, album art, or any visual content. No extra software—everything runs in your browser within Adobe Express.

localizedMetadata.summary: Flip n Find: A fun memory game of matching pairs.
localizedMetadata.name: Flip n Find
localizedMetadata.description:
Flip n' Find is a fun and interactive memory game designed to challenge and entertain players of all ages. The objective is simple: flip two cards at a time, and try to find matching pairs. If the cards match, they stay revealed; if not, they flip back over. The key to winning is remembering the positions of the cards and using that knowledge to complete the board.

With vibrant animations, smooth gameplay, and a simple interface, Flip n' Find is perfect for casual gamers or anyone looking to improve their memory. The game offers an enjoyable way to boost cognitive skills while having fun, whether playing solo or challenging friends to beat the highest score.

Its intuitive design makes it easy to play, but it requires sharp focus and concentration to master. From kids to adults, Flip n' Find provides a delightful mix of entertainment and brain training that keeps you coming back for more!

1. Channel Separations: extract RGB and CMY plates and HSL maps for inspection or plate export.
2. Glitch Suite: chromatic aberration, per‑channel noise, and colored halftone renderer for stylistic assets.

Designers prep CMY plates for print; businesses audit WCAG contrast for inclusivity; everyday users create glitch art & artistic photo splits for unique social media.

Save time and reduce retyping with fast, layout-aware table extraction. Start with 3 free credits and see how easily your PDFs and scans turn into editable Express tables.

Try it for free:
New users get 3 free credits. Each processed page (PDF) or image consumes 1 credit even if no tables were found, so it is advisable to check for tables in the preview before clicking on generate.

How Credits Work:
Credits are used only when you run Generate. Browsing, previewing, or inserting previews does not consume credits. Credit packs available: 50, 100, 200. Charges cover server-side processing, ensuring fast extraction and continuous service improvements.

Supported Formats:
Images: PNG, JPEG  (one image per file)
PDF: Multi-page

localizedMetadata.summary: Transforms user input into morse code.

localizedMetadata.description:
The Visual Morse Code add-on transforms user input into visually engaging Morse code text.

Each Morse code element is generated based on the text you enter. You can also use emojis as text to create visual effects. If you enable the sound option, Morse code audio will be provided as well. Users can utilize Morse code as a visual design element — for example, in posters or package designs. It’s also a fun feature that general users can enjoy as a playful add-on.
